description: You are the District Health Information Officer for Bo District, Sierra Leone, preparing a malaria burden analysis for a quarterly review. Using DHIS2 at http://localhost:8080 (login: admin / district), create a dashboard named 'Bo District Malaria Burden 2023' containing three visualizations: a bar or column chart named 'Bo Malaria Monthly Cases 2023' showing monthly confirmed malaria cases (RDT positive or confirmed) for Bo district in 2023; a pivot table named 'Bo Malaria Positivity Quarterly 2023' showing malaria-related indicator data (tested and/or positive counts) by quarter for Bo district in 2023; and a thematic map named 'Bo Malaria Facility Map 2023' showing malaria case
